## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in to review blog performance, discuss updates on automation, and address ongoing content projects.](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog performance stable; slight drop in deep pages (possibly seasonal)](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [New automated publishing workflow for vendor pages developed; testing phase begins](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Content updates: AI batch pages delayed due to data wrapper issues; Salesforce pages on hold](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Refresh strategy for high-performing content needs refinement to avoid potential negative impacts](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

## Topics

### Blog Performance Review

  - [Overall performance steady; no major changes or alarming trends](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Deep pages: slight drop in sessions (potentially seasonal)](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
      - [Montana, Kansas, New Mexico lost most traffic](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
      - [Montana: unusually high number of .gov pages in SERPs](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Expense category pages stabilized](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Tuning pages:](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
      - [Increased views and sessions](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
      - [Key contributors: "assets vs liabilities" and "NPV log"](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
      - ["Budget variance analysis" gained significant sessions](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Treasury pages: slight decline from previous week](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Vendor pages: generally slow week](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [New pages:](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Increasing volumes leading to more sessions](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - ["Notion vs Smartsheet" generated most clicks](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - ["Versus" pages outperforming alternatives and overviews](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Automated Publishing Workflow

  - [Test workflow developed for vendor pages (starting with overview pages)](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Testing strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
      - [Create drafts by appending "draft." to the ID](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
      - [Use actual vendor data for testing](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
      - [New sync process runs daily, publishes the next day](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
      - [New "vendor spend data" object added to vendor pages](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Team to test and report back next week](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Concern raised about refreshing high-performing content (e.g., managed travel post)](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Current refresh flow more suited for underperforming articles](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Potential improvements:](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
      - [Consider average rank in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
      - [Focus on expanding keyword opportunities for high-ranking content](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
      - [Engineering team to explore solutions for meta tweaks on well-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/XYStcvN1ku73FNcUkWXAATW3Wf7yxuUc?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
